programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History Delving into the history of Arab radio, highlighting its role in conveying the voice of the people, shaping their consciousness, and expressing their revolutions and demands. It also presents the role of radio in communication and preserving the heritage and art of the diverse Arab peoples.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: A Journey With The Oud
programme.desc: Musical Comedy The history of the Oud in the old civilizations is glorious and it had various shapes that were used by musicians and inspired lots of people to create new musical instruments.

programme.title: Sialkot's Ball
programme.desc: Sport The Pakistani city of Sialkot is known for its football industry as it delivers 60% of global production but behind this success there are stories and secrets.

programme.title: Our Angry Land
programme.desc: Nature Showcasing the scale of devastation and destruction that can result from natural disasters such as hurricanes, floods, volcanoes, earthquakes, and wildfires, highlighting the consequences of these events and their direct impact on human life and the continuity of societies.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Nature.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey

programme.title: Tahtaci People.. Children Of Forest

programme.title: A.B.I.
programme.desc: Dogan leaves his family's dark and troubled past behind and runs away to start a new life with a new identity, but the past refuses to leave him alone and forces him to return once again when some secrets come to light. Kenan Imirzalioglu, Afra Saracoglu.

programme.title: Abdel Ghani's Daughters
programme.desc: Three sisters team up to stop their older sister's forced wedding, but each of their plans fails, exposing family conflicts and the social pressures tied to marriage within the household. Abdullah Al Turkmany, Maram Al Bloushi.

programme.title: Our Club
programme.desc: Debate An interactive space where fans share their passion for Saudi football by discussing league matches, talking about their favorite clubs, and exploring the history and meaning of championships. Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy, Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy.

programme.title: My Masterpiece
programme.desc: A young woman discovers that she entangled in a web of challenges and individuals who desire what she possesses after she receives a valuable inheritance from her father. Fouz Al Shatti, Yaqoub Abdulla.

programme.desc: Debate An interactive space where fans share their passion for Saudi football by discussing league matches, talking about their favorite clubs, and exploring the history and meaning of championships. Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy.

programme.desc: Bothaina is torn between her hope of reuniting with her daughters and the painful reality of a marriage that is falling apart, until escalating conflicts and deep emotional strains force her to confront something she can no longer ignore. Sahar Husain, Abdullah Al Khuder.

programme.title: Al King
programme.desc: Once a clean boxer, Hamza is pulled into a ruthless, no-rules world when his half-brother draws him into the orbit of a corrupt, influential figure, where survival hinges on taking back what's his and protecting those he loves. Mohamed Emam, Amr Abdel Galil.

programme.title: Love Lobby
programme.desc: Disorder surrounds the hotel run by Rostom, a man obsessed with precision, as his orderly world clashes with his unruly guests, led by Shams, a fiercely independent woman who refuses marriage. Pamela El kik, Moatasem Al Nahar.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Roses And Sins
programme.desc: Serhat, a self-made man who rose from nothing, watches his stability collapse when his wife slips into a coma and he discovers a dark secret about her. In his search for answers, he crosses paths with Zeynep, a florist pursuing the same truth. Murat Yildirim, Cemre Baysel.

programme.title: Underground
programme.desc: Imprisoned for vengeance and entangled in Turkeys' deadliest cartel, Haydar Ali's true war ignites upon his release, when he learns that the woman he has always loved got married to his closest ally. Devrim Ozkan, Deniz Can Aktas.

programme.title: The Traitor
programme.desc: After discovering her husband's affair with a woman fifteen years younger, Aseel's perfect world shatters. She abandons her calm facade and transforms from a successful doctor into a woman consumed by vengeance. Sulafa Memar, Qays Sheikh Najib.

programme.desc: duo Nasser Al Gassabi and Abdullah Al Sadhan return in a new version of the series to discuss more issues of Saudi society. Nasser Al Qasabi, Abd Allah Al Sahdan, Yousef AL Jarah, Fahd Al Hayan, Habeeb Al Habeeb, Mohammad Al Qaffas, Anbar Al Dosari, Amani Al Sulaimi, Abdul Aziz Al Modhish.

programme.title: Al King
programme.desc: Once a clean boxer, Hamza is pulled into a ruthless, no-rules world when his half-brother draws him into the orbit of a corrupt, influential figure, where survival hinges on taking back what's his and protecting those he loves. Mohamed Emam, Amr Abdel Galil.

programme.title: Tambourines
programme.desc: Complex confrontations and interrelated relationships between members of a folk art group for women and another for men. Mounir Al Zaaby, Hamad Al Roomi, Huda Hussien, Ebrahim Alhasawi, Khaled Albriky, Shima`a Aly, Rawan Mahdi, Huda Hussain, Ibrahim Alhasawi.

programme.title: Surrogate Mother
programme.desc: When the Iraqi family discovers that their daughter-in-law is not having children, they begin to consider hiring another woman as a surrogate mother. Hend Kamel, Adel Abbas, Zohour Alaa, Alexander Uloom, Joumanah Kareem, Nada Emad Khalil, David Oryan, Hind Kamel, Hind Kamil.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.desc: S2026 E72 يطل الإعلامي الكبير عمرو أديب على جمهوره، حيث يقدم في كل حلقة فقرات سياسية واجتماعية واقتصادية وفنية، ويقوم بتحليل الأحداث اليومية بأسلوب مبسط ومسلي.

programme.title: Blank
programme.desc: The police is after Hanif the dangerous bomber who is on the streets walking by an actual bomb he knows nothing about in order to save the lives of the innocent. Sunny Deol, Karan Kapadia, Ishita Dutta, Behzad Khambata, Pranav Adarsh.

programme.title: Right Yaaa Wrong
programme.desc: After he wakes up at the hospital and finds out that he won't be able to walk again , Sridhar, a police officer asks his wife and brother to plan his murder to get the money of the policy insurance and live a better life. Neeraj Pathak, Sanjay Chauhan, Sunny Deol, Irrfan Khan, Isha Koppikar, Konkona Sen Sharma, Deepal Shaw, Neeraj Pathak.

programme.title: Chup
programme.desc: A policeman seeks to reveal the mystery behind the murders of film critics and arrest the killer. Pooja Bhatt, Sunny Deol, Shreya Dhanwanthary, Dulquer Salmaan, Saranya Ponvannan, R. Balki, R. Balki, Amitabh Bachchan.

programme.title: My Fat Wife
programme.desc: An overweight girl gets used to the constant rejection of the opposite sex because of her outward appearance, but when her path crosses with a wrestling superstar, she realizes that love knows no law. Rytasha Rathore, Prince Narula.

programme.title: Broken Bond
programme.desc: Maitree and Nandini's deep-rooted friendship turns into a bitter rivalry amid misunderstandings, betrayals, and hidden truths. The conflict escalates as vengeance arises, affecting everyone around them. Shrenu Parikh, Bhaweeka Chaudhary, Samarth Jurel, Aadesh Chaudhary, Urvi Upadhyay, Devender Kumar Pandey, Jitendra Gupta.

programme.title: Issaq
programme.desc: When Rahul falls in love with Bachchi, their mafia families will not accept this relationship and do their best to end it. Amyra Dastur, Ravi Kishan, Prashant Narayanan, Rajeshwari Sachdev, Manish Tiwary, Pawan Sony, Padmaja Thakore.

programme.title: Mrs. Chatterjee VS. Norway
programme.desc: Debika Chatterjee, an immigrant Indian mother, struggles for her children after the Norwegian government takes them from her. Rani Mukerji, Jim Sarbh, Balaji Gauri, Neena Gupta, Sara Soulié, Ashima Chibber, Ashima Chibber.

programme.desc: Luvleen is a good teacher in a school which she wants to collect donations for, and she meets a wealthy man, and things change. Mahaakshay Chakraborty, Evelyn Sharma, Mohit Dutta, Kavin Dave, Suhasini Mulay, V.K. Prakash, P. K. Anil.

programme.desc: An attempted assassination of a notorious mafia boss goes wrong, killing an innocent man and igniting a blood feud led by his daughter, who vows vengeance.
